channel.title: Physical Sciences Reviews
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Physical Sciences Reviews

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2025-frontmatter1-2

item.title: Potential development of thermally stable polycrystalline photovoltaic modules utilizing biocomposite materials
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-0026

item.title: Mathematical modelling of hollow-fiber haemodialysis modules
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-0062

item.title: Computational modelling in liver system and liver disease
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-0051

item.title: An introduction to quantitative systems pharmacology for chemical engineers
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-0066

item.title: Macroscopic transport models for drugs and vehicles in cancer tissues
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-0059

item.title: Engaging pre-service teachers in an indigenous activity to investigate sustainability and green practices in palm oil production
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2023-0053

item.title: Performance of 6 × 6 CNT transistor array using composite nanomaterials for biomedical applications
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-0029

item.title: Functionalization and performance of hybrid nanocellulose from plant-based/metal oxide nanocomposites for sustainable energy applications
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-0025

item.title: Modelling drug permeation across the skin: a chemical engineering perspective
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-0056

item.title: Environmental life cycle analysis of natural fiber composites in energy sector
item.description: Article by Mohammad Zaid Hasan, Mohd Sapuan Salit, Nor Salwa Hamdan, Faieza Abdul Aziz, Abir Khan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psr-2024-0027
